languages.text: "Я согласен с полковником Батошски, Ваша Светлость. Нечего нам делать там, среди звезд. Мы тут родились, тут и помереть должны. А там что? В песнях поется, что раньше наш полк прикрывал полки почище и помирал в грязи за других. Здесь, на Заркове, я хотя бы знаю за что и за кого сражаюсь".

"I'm with Colonel Batoshski on this, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. There's nothing for us out there in the stars. We were born here, and we must die here. The songs say our regiment used to serve as cover for the cleaner regiments and rot in the mud for them too. Here on Zarkov, at least I know who and what I'm fighting for."
languages.original_text: "Я согласен с полковником Батошски, Ваша Светлость. Нечего нам делать там, среди звезд. Мы тут родились, тут и помереть должны. А там что? В песнях поется, что раньше наш полк прикрывал полки почище и помирал в грязи за других. Здесь, на Заркове, я хотя бы знаю за что и за кого сражаюсь".

traits.locale_text: "I'm with Colonel Batoshski on this, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. There's nothing for us out there in the stars. We were born here, and here we must meet our end. What is there for us? The songs say our regiment used to cover for fancy regiments and rot in the mud for them. Here on Zarkov, at least I know the reason and the people I'm fighting for."

"I'm with Colonel Batoshski on this, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. There's nothing for us out there in the stars. We were born here, and we must die here. What is there for us? The songs say our regiment used to serve as cover for the posh regiments and rot in the mud for them too. Here on Zarkov, at least I know who and what I'm fighting for."

"I agree with Batoshski, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. If the Imperium gets its hands on us again, it'll brand us as deserters, order us to atone for the crimes of our ancestors, and send us to die as human shields for more noble regiments. I don't believe in leniency or forgiveness, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

"I'm with Colonel Batoshski on this, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. There's nothing for us out there in the stars. We were born here, and here we must meet our end. What is there for us? The songs say our regiment used to cover for fancy regiments and rot in the mud for them. Here on Zarkov, at least I know the reason and the people I'm fighting for."

"I'm with Colonel Batoshski on this, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. There's nothing for us out there in the stars. We were born here, and we must die here. What is there for us? The songs say our regiment used to serve as cover for the posh regiments and rot in the mud for them too. Here on Zarkov, at least I know who and what I'm fighting for."

"I'm with Colonel Batoshski on this, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. There's nothing for us out there in the stars. We were born here, and we must die here. The songs say our regiment used to serve as cover for the cleaner regiments and rot in the mud for them too. Here on Zarkov, at least I know who and what I'm fighting for."

languages.text: 「バトシュスキーに賛成です、御{mf|殿|女殿}。帝国が再び我々を捕まえるならば、我々を逃亡兵として烙印を押し、祖先たちの罪を償わせるよう命じ、より高貴な連隊の盾として死に至らしめるでしょう。御{mf|殿|女殿}、私は寛大さや赦しを信じません」
languages.original_text: "I agree with Batoshski, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. If the Imperium gets its hands on us again, it'll brand us as deserters, order us to atone for the crimes of our ancestors, and send us to die as human shields for more noble regiments. I don't believe in leniency or forgiveness, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: "Bu konuda Albay Batoshski ile aynı fikirdeyim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Yıldızların ötesinde bizim için hiçbir şey yok. Biz burada doğduk ve burada ölmeliyiz. Şarkılar, alayımızın eskiden o temizlik alaylarına kalkan olduğunu ve onlar için çamurda çürüdüğünü söylüyor. Burada, Zarkov'da en azından kimin ve neyin uğruna savaştığımı biliyorum."
languages.original_text: "I'm with Colonel Batoshski on this, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. There's nothing for us out there in the stars. We were born here, and we must die here. The songs say our regiment used to serve as cover for the cleaner regiments and rot in the mud for them too. Here on Zarkov, at least I know who and what I'm fighting for."

traits.locale_text: "Bu konuda Albay Batoshski ile aynı fikirdeyim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Yıldızların ötesinde bizim için hiçbir şey yok. Biz burada doğduk ve burada ölmeliyiz. Şarkılar, alayımızın eskiden o temizlik alaylarına kalkan olduğunu ve onlar için çamurda çürüdüğünü söylüyor. Burada, Zarkov'da en azından kimin ve neyin uğruna savaştığımı biliyorum."

languages.text: “这一点我跟巴托什斯基上校看法一致，大人。外面那片星辰，没有我们的一席之地。我们生在这儿，也该死在这儿。歌里都说了，我们军团过去净给那些上等军团当肉盾，替他们烂死在泥里。至少在扎尔科夫，我知道自己在为谁而战、为什么而战。”
languages.original_text: "I'm with Colonel Batoshski on this, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. There's nothing for us out there in the stars. We were born here, and we must die here. The songs say our regiment used to serve as cover for the cleaner regiments and rot in the mud for them too. Here on Zarkov, at least I know who and what I'm fighting for."

traits.locale_text: “这一点我跟巴托什斯基上校看法一致，大人。外面那片星辰，没有我们的一席之地。我们生在这儿，也该死在这儿。歌里都说了，我们军团过去净给那些上等军团当肉盾，替他们烂死在泥里。至少在扎尔科夫，我知道自己在为谁而战、为什么而战。”

languages.text: "In diesem Punkt bin ich Colonel Batoshskis Meinung, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Für uns gibt es da draußen zwischen den Sternen nichts. Wir wurden hier geboren und müssen hier sterben. Wenn man den Liedern glaubt, diente unser Regiment als Deckung für vornehmeren Regimenter und ist für sie im Dreck verrottet. Hier auf Zarkov weiß ich wenigstens wer ich bin und wofür ich kämpfe."
languages.original_text: "I'm with Colonel Batoshski on this, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. There's nothing for us out there in the stars. We were born here, and we must die here. The songs say our regiment used to serve as cover for the cleaner regiments and rot in the mud for them too. Here on Zarkov, at least I know who and what I'm fighting for."

traits.locale_text: "In diesem Punkt bin ich Colonel Batoshskis Meinung, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Für uns gibt es da draußen zwischen den Sternen nichts. Wir wurden hier geboren und müssen hier sterben. Wenn man den Liedern glaubt, diente unser Regiment als Deckung für vornehmeren Regimenter und ist für sie im Dreck verrottet. Hier auf Zarkov weiß ich wenigstens wer ich bin und wofür ich kämpfe."

languages.text: « Je me range à l'avis du colonel Batoshski à ce sujet, Votre Seigneurie. Nous n'avons pas notre place dans les étoiles. Nous sommes nés ici et c'est ici que nous devons mourir. Les chansons disent que notre régiment servait autrefois de couverture aux unités plus propres sur elles et qu'il crevait dans la boue pour elles aussi. Au moins, sur Zarkov, je sais pour qui et pour quoi je me bats. »
languages.original_text: "I'm with Colonel Batoshski on this, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. There's nothing for us out there in the stars. We were born here, and we must die here. The songs say our regiment used to serve as cover for the cleaner regiments and rot in the mud for them too. Here on Zarkov, at least I know who and what I'm fighting for."

traits.locale_text: « Je me range à l'avis du colonel Batoshski à ce sujet, Votre Seigneurie. Nous n'avons pas notre place dans les étoiles. Nous sommes nés ici et c'est ici que nous devons mourir. Les chansons disent que notre régiment servait autrefois de couverture aux unités plus propres sur elles et qu'il crevait dans la boue pour elles aussi. Au moins, sur Zarkov, je sais pour qui et pour quoi je me bats. »

languages.text: «Estoy de acuerdo con el coronel Batoshski, mi{mf|lord|lady}. No hay nada para nosotros entre las estrellas. Nacimos aquí y debemos morir aquí. Las canciones dicen que nuestro regimiento cubría a los regimientos más limpios y se pudría en el barro por ellos. Aquí, en Zarkov, al menos sé por quién y por qué lucho».
languages.original_text: "I'm with Colonel Batoshski on this, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. There's nothing for us out there in the stars. We were born here, and we must die here. The songs say our regiment used to serve as cover for the cleaner regiments and rot in the mud for them too. Here on Zarkov, at least I know who and what I'm fighting for."
